items.title: The Knicks have pined for LeBron James for so long that this would have been insane to hear in 2010 or 2014 or 2018 👇
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
The Knicks have pined for LeBron James for so long that this would have been insane to hear in 2010 or 2014 or 2018 👇
www.instagram.com/reel/DaVlHce...

media.title: mikevorkunov on Instagram: "LeBron James to the Knicks? Imagine hearing this on July 9, 2010."It's difficult because the last thing you wanna do is mess up som…"
media.description: LeBron James to the Knicks? Imagine hearing this on July 9, 2010."It's difficult because the last thing you wanna do is mess up something like that," Rich Paul, LeBron's agent, said on his Game Over podcast."If the Knicks hadn't have won, there would be no board. He'd be going to the Knicks."But the Knicks did win an NBA title. They're the champions now. And as LeBron James picks his next team the Knicks are too successful now.How things have changed in the best way possible for the Knicks. Remember 2010, when LeBron made his Decision after the Knicks made an all out push to sign him. He went to Miami instead. They were in a bad place. Now, they've won too much to land him. And I bet they don't mind. Neither do Knicks fans. Many probably don't care anymore.Rich Paul acknowledged the lay of the land. Another star runs New York now."Jalen Brunson would literally have to pick up the phone and say 'Hey man, it's no issue with me.'... And also it's Jalen Brunson's show. He's earned that right."Clip above from the Game Over podcast.#nyk #nba #lebron #knicks

items.title: Putting a bow on the Paul George’s stint with the Sixers, which arrived with much hoopla and then was frequently interrupted by injuries and suspension. He only played 36 games with both Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey across two seasons.
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
Putting a bow on the Paul George’s stint with the Sixers, which arrived with much hoopla and then was frequently interrupted by injuries and suspension. He only played 36 games with both Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey across two seasons. 

www.inquirer.com/sixers/paul-...

media.title: Paul George was a flashy free-agent signing two years ago. His choppy Sixers stint led to another blockbuster trade
media.description: George, a former perennial All-Star and the Sixers' big free-agent signing in 2024, played in 78 total games across two seasons — and only 36 with both Joel Embiid and Tyrese Maxey.
